name: commerce/acp-delegated-payment
description: Conformance vectors for fromACPDelegatedPaymentObservation in @peac/mappings-acp. Validates the mapper-boundary finality-synthesis guard and settlement-proof discriminator applied to ACP delegated-payment observations across the closed observed_payment_state enum and across strictness modes.
invariants: pending, failed, and revoked observed states MUST NOT emit a commerce event.
authorized observed state with artifact_kind=authorization emits commerce.event=authorization.
settled observed state with artifact_kind=settlement emits commerce.event=settlement.
settled observed state without a matching settlement artifact_kind throws in ALL strictness modes.
authorized observed state with artifact_kind=settlement throws in ALL modes.
Strict mode rejects missing or UNKNOWN currency and out-of-enum env; interop warns; legacy is silent.
Token material is NEVER carried; only payment_method_token_ref is preserved.
Raw upstream_artifact is preserved verbatim under proofs.acp.delegated_payment.upstream_artifact.
artifact_kind is preserved alongside the artifact under proofs.acp.delegated_payment.artifact_kind when supplied.
PaymentEvidence.amount is the integer minor-unit value parsed from authorized_amount_minor; no currency-aware scaling.
